title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Q3 Earnings Beat, Sales Increase Y/Y
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) third-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect higher sales on positive net price realization. However, earnings decline from the year-ago quarter's reported figure.

title: Smuckers Q3 results suggest ‘things are going exceptionally well'
text: Shares of J.M. Smucker Co (NYSE: SJM) are slightly in the red this morning even though the food and beverage company reported market-beating earnings for its third financial quarter.

title: Smucker (SJM) Surpasses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Smucker (SJM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.76% and 0.26%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: J.M. Smucker stock jumps on Q3 earnings beat, raised EPS outlook
text: J.M. Smucker Co.'s SJM, -0.36% stock jumped 2.5% before market open Tuesday after the company beat analysts' earnings estimate in its third-quarter results and raised its full year earnings outlook. The consumer and pet foods company, whose brands include Folgers, Jif and Milk-Bone, reported third quarter net income of $208.5 million, or $1.95 a share, up from $69.7 million, or $0.64 a share in the year-ago quarter.

title: Should You Buy The J. M. Smucker (SJM) Ahead of Earnings?
text: The J. M. Smucker (SJM) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For March 2023
text: NOBL started the year off with a gain of 3.23% in January; it is thus far not faring as well in February, but the ETF is still positive year-to-date. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Readies for Q3 Earnings: Things to Note
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) third-quarter results are likely to reflect the adverse impacts of cost inflation, while pricing efforts and strength in the coffee business bode well.

title: Why Smucker (SJM) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Smucker (SJM) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Post to buy 9Lives, other pet-food brands from Smucker for $1.2 billion
text: Post Holdings Inc. POST, -0.87% said late Wednesday it has agreed to buy some pet-food brands from J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, -0.74% for $1.2 billion.

title: Michael Burry vs. Jim Cramer: Is It Time to Buy or Sell Stocks Now?
text: Two investing influencers have expressed opposite takes on how investors should play the current market. Michael Burry, of The Big Short fame, is no stranger to issuing ominous warnings for investors.
